notes: Chunk 45 (Template E, Tier B) complete 2026-06-10. 25 new routes: Baltic states (EE/LV/LT/SI) to AU/CA/US, Caucasus/Central Asia (AM/GE/AZ/KZ) to DE/FR, Caribbean/LatAm (DO/JM/PA/UY) to DE/FR, East Africa (RW/UG) to DE, Middle East (LB) to DE. Routes 5556->5581, pages 6350->6376. Blog Day 15: uk-pet-transport-cost-calculator.md (Marcus Webb, 1800 words, cost calculator by route, GBP breakdown tables). Next: Chunk 46 (Template A, Tier B). Blog Day 16 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
